description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a brick exterior, surrounded by a low beige wall. The front features a double garage, a paved driveway, and a main entrance with a single door and large rectangular windows. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a circular above-ground structure (possibly a hot tub or gazebo), and a patio area with outdoor seating. The property is landscaped with a mix of green and purple-leaved trees and shrubs, providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some spanning large sections of the facade. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio. The property is enclosed by a low wall and surrounded by trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, driveway, and two parked cars, with large windows and a low wall enclosing the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, a single window, the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and circular structure, as well as the rear entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by lush trees and shrubs, with large windows and the backyard area partially visible behind the foliage.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the pool, patio, circular structure, and the back of the house with additional windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, paved steps, and large adjacent windows, set within a minimalistic facade without porch or columns.
